violations.description: Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. - Raw chicken was in standing water vs cool running water.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required.
Plumbing system. — --Deep clean the grease trap area in the basement.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Clean the walls and ceiling in the kitchen.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
